messages.content: Which planet do humans live on?

message.content:
Humans do not live on any of the planets in our solar system. We live on Earth, which is the third planet from the Sun and the only known planet to support life.

While there have been several unmanned missions sent to explore other planets in our solar system, including Mars, no human has traveled or settled on another planet... yet!

However, there are ongoing efforts to send humans to other planets and celestial bodies, such as NASA's Artemis program, which aims to return humans to the Moon by 2024 and establish a sustainable presence on the lunar surface. The ultimate goal of this program is to use the Moon as a stepping stone for a manned mission to Mars in the 2030s.

So while we don't live on other planets yet, space agencies and private companies are working towards making human exploration and settlement of other celestial bodies a reality in the coming decades!
